summary: Comprehensive RBAC testing completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend RBAC features working correctly including role-based navigation hiding, User Management page, and Forgot Password flow.

Backend: Doctor login success

Backend: Admin can get all users
Backend: Doctor cannot get all users (403)

Backend: Admin can delete user
Backend: Get available roles

Backend: Doctor cannot access staff list (403)
Backend: Doctor cannot create staff (403)
Backend: Admin can access financial reports
Backend: Doctor cannot access financial reports (403)

context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC implementation is complete and working. Roles: admin (full access), doctor/front_desk/therapist (restricted - no HR/Reports/Users access), hr (HR + reports access). Password reset is MOCKED - tokens logged to server console.
